title: phyllanthus niruri var. debilis
intro: Phyllanthus niruri var. debilis, also known as the dwarf or weak-leaf Phyllanthus niruri, is a variety of the Phyllanthus niruri plant, a tropical plant species native to the Americas and Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niruri var. debilis include its ability to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat conditions such as jaundice, fever, and respiratory issues.
